stories.title: 'This team can be super special': The Wizards' sta...
stories.summary: Will the trio be the difference that takes Washington from last place in the East to a competitive contender?

stories.title: Expanded NHL season turns up heat on rivalries
stories.summary: The NHL released its 2026-27 regular-season schedule Thursday, as the league expands its campaign from 82 to 84 games this season.

stories.title: Sources: Burns, Reds reach 7-year, $105M deal
stories.summary: All-Star right-hander Chase Burns, who is 11-1 with a 2.54 ERA this season, has agreed to a seven-year, $105 million extension with the Reds, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Scheffler recovers awry ball in Open first round
stories.summary: World No.1 Scottie Scheffler recovered after sending a ball deep in the grass to post a 2-under 68 in the first round of the 154th Open Championship.

stories.title: NBA won't punish Bam for altercation with Herro
stories.summary: The NBA will not punish the Heat's Bam Adebayo for striking former teammate Tyler Herro at a Las Vegas gym last Friday, a league spokesperson told ESPN's Shams Charania on Thursday.
